title: NPCIL MAPS – Apprentices – 158 Posts

basic_details.job_title: NPCIL MAPS Apprentices Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 158 Trade, Diploma and Graduate Apprentices Posts
basic_details.short_information: NPCIL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 158 vacancies for Apprentices posts. Candidates can apply Offline only from 25.05.2026 to 30.06.2026 through NPCIL website npcil.nic.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Human Resources Group, NPCIL – Madras Atomic Power Station
basic_details.post_name: Trade Apprentice / Diploma Apprentice / Graduate Apprentice (Non-Engineering)
basic_details.application_mode: Offline only – Application form to be sent by Post to Deputy Manager (HRM), NPCIL MAPS, Kalpakkam

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree in non-engineering/general streams (BA, B.Sc., B.Com., etc.) including sandwich courses granted by a College/University recognized by AICTE/UGC/State Government/Central Government (Full-Time/Regular mode only). Degree must have been passed within 5 years of 30/06/2026.

selection_process: Merit based on marks obtained in ITI / Diploma / Graduation. Preference to candidates from neighbouring villages within 16 km radius of plant site.
Marks obtained in ITI / Diploma / Graduation qualifying examination
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply offline only - no online application portal is available for submission. The process involves two steps: first, mandatory registration on NAPS 2.0 / NATS 2.0 portal; second, sending the filled application form by post to NPCIL MAPS Kalpakkam. Incomplete or erroneous applications or applications without proper enclosures will be summarily rejected without any communication.
seo_tags: NPCIL Madras Atomic Power Station Apprentices Recruitment 2026
